VoltAgent awesome-design-md — https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md (DESIGN.md references for agency-grade UI discipline)
pexelsAttribution: Placeholder media from https://www.pexels.com/ — replace with licensed assets for production.

platforms.label: Marketing landing (multi-section)
platforms.stackNote: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + lucide-react; optional motion

platforms.label: Product web app shell
platforms.stackNote: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind; optional shadcn/ui

platforms.label: Dashboard web app
platforms.stackNote: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind + dense tables/charts placeholders

fontVibes.labelZh: 冷淡编辑 · 衬线权威
fontVibes.pickerLabel: Editorial premium — serif display + neutral sans
fontVibes.label: 编辑级高级感（衬线标题 + 中性无衬线正文）
fontVibes.notes: §5.2 H1 ladder text-4xl→xl:text-7xl; letterSpacing -0.04em or tracking-tight; leading-[0.95]–[1.1]; body -webkit-font-smoothing antialiased

fontVibes.labelZh: 粗野海报 · 压缩无衬线
fontVibes.pickerLabel: Brutalist poster — tight sans + mono body
fontVibes.label: 粗野海报（超紧无衬线 + 等宽正文）
fontVibes.notes: Uppercase mono labels; poster scale; avoid illegible micro type except L4.6 card-wall pattern

fontVibes.labelZh: 温暖 SaaS · 亲和几何
fontVibes.pickerLabel: Warm SaaS — rounded geometry + serif accents
fontVibes.label: 温暖 SaaS（圆角几何 + 衬线点缀）
fontVibes.notes: Rounded radii; Instrument Serif accents only where style library calls for serif warmth

fontVibes.labelZh: 技术 / AI · 冷静数据
fontVibes.pickerLabel: Technical / AI — dense data + mono readouts
fontVibes.label: 技术 / AI 产品（Geist / Sora 感）
fontVibes.notes: Dense copy + mono for readouts; tabular nums where metrics

fontVibes.labelZh: 路演字幕 · 斜体衬线
fontVibes.label: 路演 / Deck（斜体衬线 + Barlow）
fontVibes.notes: Italic display for deck titles; Material Symbols optional for icon rows per §5.1

fontVibes.labelZh: 汽车张力 · 超粗展示
fontVibes.label: 汽车 / 运动张力（超粗展示）
fontVibes.notes: Uppercase nav + decorative giant type; keep body readable size

fontVibes.label: 科幻 / 3D 启动页
fontVibes.notes: §5.1 recipe 7; pair with optional Spline stackProfile + pointer-events layering

colorVibes.explainerZh: 像 Huemint「品牌多色交集」：先锁定一枚暖主色与一枚冷主色，导航、链接、标签只用从中混合出的中性阶；两枚主色不要同时大面积铺满，整体仍像一个品牌手册。
colorVibes.label: Warm/cold brand pair + neutrals
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Brand systems with two primaries + derived neutrals
colorVibes.cssHint: Define --warm-600 --cool-600 --neutral-50…900; CTA uses one primary, links use the other at 70% saturation; no third hue except ±8° family tints

colorVibes.explainerZh: 背景 / 正文 / 强调 三色之外，只允许同一色相上 ±6% 亮度的「亲属色」做 hover、divider；饱和度由低到高只出现一次，避免彩虹散焦。
colorVibes.label: Tri-color guardrails
colorVibes.cssHint: bg + fg + accent only; hover = accent @ 85% L or sibling step; forbid new hues on cards

colorVibes.explainerZh: 一对低饱和互补色（不必 180° 拉满）+ 大面米白或冷灰底；互补只用于小图标、状态点、细线，阅读面保持冷静。
colorVibes.label: Soft complementary pair
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Calm UI with restrained complement accents
colorVibes.cssHint: Complement accents max chroma 35–45; body text on neutral 96–98% L

colorVibes.explainerZh: 在色环约 60° 内取 2–3 色，拆成 surface-1 / surface-2 / border，看起来像渐变被切成扁平层，仍算「一种色相家族」。
colorVibes.label: Analogous ribbon surfaces
colorVibes.cssHint: ΔH between surfaces ≤25°; vary L 8–15 steps; one darkest for text

colorVibes.explainerZh: 陶土、沙、橄榄等大面大地色打底，只留一颗可「锁」的饱和宝石色（青绿或石榴红）做 CTA；其余交互回到大地阶，整体像珠宝衬布。
colorVibes.label: Earth base + single jewel accent
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Bohemian / premium craft + one spark hue
colorVibes.cssHint: Jewel chroma 60+ only on buttons/badges; surfaces chroma ≤15

colorVibes.explainerZh: 主色一道 + 两侧邻近的「双强调」只做能量条、进度、小标签；两强调不要相邻大块并置，中间用中性带隔开。
colorVibes.label: Split-complement energy accents
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Youth / sports / tech marketing with controlled triad
colorVibes.cssHint: Primary 220°; accents at +30° / +150° at ≤12% screen area each

colorVibes.explainerZh: 对应 Huemint「Website · Magazine」式四色：纸感背景、标题墨、正文灰、唯一彩色专给章节标签或引用条；彩色不抢标题，只负责「这是新一块内容」。
colorVibes.label: Magazine 4-role palette
colorVibes.cssHint: bg paper 96–98% L; headline #1a1a1a; body #444; accent single hsl for section kicker

colorVibes.explainerZh: 大面积留白 + 一条高对比横色（报头 / hero band），内文区退回浅灰与墨字；横色里再嵌白字按钮，层次像印刷封面。
colorVibes.label: Masthead color band + calm body
colorVibes.cssHint: Hero band solid hue; below-fold neutral-100 surfaces; max 1 extra accent

colorVibes.explainerZh: 一栏偏暖沙、一栏偏冷灰，链接与图标共用同一中灰蓝，让读者感觉「同一本站」；左右区不要各引入新饱和色。
colorVibes.label: Warm vs cool column zones
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Split layouts / bento with zoned temperature
colorVibes.cssHint: Shared link color H220 S25%; warm zone bg H35 S8%; cool zone H220 S6%

colorVibes.explainerZh: 深蓝灰底、月白字、琥珀或铜色链接；图片框用再暗一阶，像夜间模式杂志，仍保持四色以内角色清晰。
colorVibes.label: Night magazine reader
colorVibes.cssHint: bg H230 S25% L12%; text L92%; links H35 S70% L55%; img frame L8%

colorVibes.explainerZh: 全站低饱和灰彩底，只给 pull-quote 或数据高光一行饱和色；像杂志里只有引言用荧光笔划过。
colorVibes.label: Muted site + one pop quote color
colorVibes.cssHint: Surfaces chroma ≤12; pop hue single use on blockquote + KPI

colorVibes.explainerZh: 主文仍是黑白灰，两枚小面积强调色只出现在左侧导航轨与页内标签，互不接触则不乱；适合工具站分区。
colorVibes.label: Dual accent on rails only
colorVibes.cssHint: Nav accent A; tab accent B; never A+B on same component

colorVibes.explainerZh: Huemint Monochrome 思路：白、浅灰卡片、中灰分割、墨字四阶即可成站；不要用彩色阴影冒充层次。
colorVibes.label: Paper–ink monochrome stack
colorVibes.cssHint: 4 stops: 100% 96% 88% 12% L; borders use 88% vs 96% only

colorVibes.explainerZh: 同一色相蓝灰，nav 与正文背景只差 5–8% 亮度即可区分；适合开发者文档、控制台外壳类站点。
colorVibes.label: Blue-gray single-hue ramp
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Dev portals / API docs / dense UI
colorVibes.cssHint: Single H 215–225; S 6–14%; L steps 8–12 between chrome layers

colorVibes.explainerZh: 对应 Huemint 说明里「前景与背景之间的中间shade」：卡片、表头、分割专用一层 bridge gray，让高对比黑白不刺眼。
colorVibes.label: Middle-shade bridge cards
colorVibes.cssHint: Define --surface-bridge between bg and fg L; tables use bridge for zebra

colorVibes.explainerZh: 奶油 → 卡布奇诺 → 浓缩色阶讲品牌故事，无第二色相；适合餐饮、手工、慢品牌。
colorVibes.label: Warm coffee monochrome
colorVibes.cssHint: Hue lock H25–35; vary L only; deepest for text not pure black

colorVibes.explainerZh: 冷灰单色阶上叠图表线色也用同一色相、只提高一度对比；避免彩虹图例破坏单色站感。
colorVibes.label: Cool slate data monochrome
colorVibes.cssHint: Chart series use L/S steps of same H; max one dashed emphasis pattern

colorVibes.explainerZh: 面仍是灰阶，用香槟或银的 1px ring 代替第二色相做「贵气」；金属色只描边，不涂大面。
colorVibes.label: Monochrome + metallic outline token
colorVibes.cssHint: ring-1 ring-[hsl(40_20%_70%)] style; fills stay neutral only

colorVibes.explainerZh: 背景用约 15° 内的 Hue 渐变（很窄），前景 CTA 用该 family 里一个纯色点；整体像 Huemint 渐变工具里锁住色相漂移。
colorVibes.label: Tight-hue ribbon background
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Soft marketing heroes / Aurora-lite without rainbow
colorVibes.cssHint: bg-gradient from hsl(H S 96%) to hsl(H+12 S 92%); CTA hsl(H S 45% 45%)

colorVibes.explainerZh: 深青绿底上，两枚冷霓虹只做 border-glow / 1px 描边，填充体仍保持 deep teal 家族；克制光晕才显贵。
colorVibes.label: Dark base + aurora edge glows
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Sci-fi premium / web3-adjacent without purple slop
colorVibes.cssHint: Glow tokens cyan/teal only; fill surfaces H175–195 S35–45% L10–18%

colorVibes.explainerZh: 粉彩大面仍配深灰字保证可读；一枚铬黄或柠黄只给主按钮与关键数字，像杂志里唯一荧光笔。
colorVibes.label: Pastel surfaces + safe chrome accent
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Gen-Z soft UI with WCAG-safe accent
colorVibes.cssHint: Pastel bg chroma ≤18 L≥92%; text L≤25%; accent single high-L yellow-green

colorVibes.labelZh: 暗夜电影 · 深蓝黑底
colorVibes.explainerZh: 电影感深色底，视频或大图上叠渐变蒙版保证字可读；不要随意加未定义的紫/靛，除非写进 token。
colorVibes.label: Dark cinematic
colorVibes.cssHint: Deep navy/black HSL --background; scrim % stops on video; forbid random purple/indigo unless tokenized

colorVibes.labelZh: 日光编辑 · 纸感留白
colorVibes.explainerZh: 偏暖或偏冷的纸白底 + 炭黑字 + 极细分割线；留白本身就是「颜色」，适合长文与品牌故事页。
colorVibes.label: Light editorial paper
colorVibes.cssHint: Off-white base; charcoal type; hairline borders; generous margins

colorVibes.labelZh: 霓虹赛博 · 黑底荧光
colorVibes.explainerZh: 黑底上荧光绿/青/洋红只做小面积状态与线条；正文对比要过 WCAG，霓虹不是字体的借口。
colorVibes.label: Neon cyber
colorVibes.cssHint: Black base; neon green/cyan/magenta as accent tokens only; WCAG on body

colorVibes.explainerZh: 陶土、沙、橄榄、奶油互相做邻居色，像自然材料摆在一起；高饱和只留给小标签或图标。
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Bohemian / Farmhouse / Mystical Western earth palette
colorVibes.label: Warm earth
colorVibes.cssHint: Terracotta sand olive cream; low-chrome neutrals; wood texture optional <TEXTURE_IMAGE>

colorVibes.labelZh: 冷色信任 · 蓝灰企业
colorVibes.explainerZh: 蓝灰白建立信任感，图表与表格只用同一冷族里的明度阶；一枚品牌蓝贯穿链接与焦点。
colorVibes.label: Cool corporate trust
colorVibes.cssHint: Slate blue-gray white; single accent hue; tables/charts neutrals

colorVibes.labelZh: 粉彩雾面 · 柔和界面
colorVibes.explainerZh: 粉彩面 + 深灰字，避免粉配白字；可加极轻噪点层增加质感，但不改变色相数量。
colorVibes.label: Soft pastel
colorVibes.cssHint: Pastel surfaces + charcoal text; verify contrast; optional grain overlay z-50 pointer-events-none

colorVibes.labelZh: 黑白香槟 · 奢华克制
colorVibes.explainerZh: 黑、白、香槟金属三色阶；贵气来自留白和金属边，而不是彩虹渐变。
colorVibes.styleLibraryAlign: Luxury Typography / Neoclassical / Art Deco metals
colorVibes.label: Monochrome luxury
colorVibes.cssHint: Black white champagne; metallic borders via pseudo rings not rainbow gradients

colorVibes.labelZh: 高饱和波普 · CMY 冲击
colorVibes.explainerZh: 黄青品 + 黑描边，像波普海报；每个高饱和块要有 token 名，禁止随手吸色破坏成套感。
colorVibes.label: High-saturation pop
colorVibes.cssHint: CMY + black outlines; token-locked roles for fill/stroke/text; halftone optional

colorVibeGroups.label: Magazine-style web palettes (~4 roles, editorial rhythm)
Tight hue bridges / dark-base glows (token-safe gradients)
Classic vibes — cinematic, neon, earth, pop

motionKits.label: Character cascade — headline attention
motionKits.detail: ~30ms/char; 200ms start delay; opacity + translateX on inline-block spans

motionKits.label: Image/video hover zoom
motionKits.detail: group overflow-hidden rounded-[14px]; child duration-700 group-hover:scale-[1.03]

motionKits.label: Video loop crossfade — seamless feel
motionKits.detail: rAF near loop ends; guard re-entrancy; on ended reset currentTime

motionKits.label: Scroll-linked text reveal
motionKits.detail: motion useScroll + useTransform per word/char opacity

motionKits.label: Horizontal marquee — logos / ticker
motionKits.detail: duplicate row translateX(-50%) infinite linear; optional edge masks

motionKits.label: Scroll-scrubbed video — progress follows scroll
motionKits.detail: GSAP ScrollTrigger scrub→video.currentTime; seek coalescing; buffer overlay

motionKits.label: Circular expanding fullscreen menu
motionKits.detail: clip-path circle expand; stagger links; body scroll lock

motionKits.label: Cursor spotlight / masked reveal
motionKits.detail: SVG mask trails; perf gate + mobile fallback

motionKits.label: React Bits · Animations (cursor, particles, GSAP, …)
motionKits.detail: React Bits / Animations: pick TSX in Motion code panel; layer lightly with site M-kits; mind §3.2 perf + reduced-motion

motionKits.label: React Bits · Backgrounds (gradients, grids, aurora)
motionKits.detail: React Bits / Backgrounds: hero or section fills; watch z-index vs body text contrast

motionKits.label: React Bits · Components (carousels, accordions, cards)
motionKits.detail: React Bits / Components: reusable blocks; trim props to need

motionKits.label: React Bits · Text (gradients, splits, scroll type)
motionKits.detail: React Bits / TextAnimations: headline/tagline hierarchy; avoid whole-page overload

motionKitGroups.label: React Bits categories (filters panel to React Bits; else show GSAP / Anime.js too)

l4Blueprint.L4.1: §4.1 Full-bleed hero: `relative min-h-screen overflow-hidden`; media `absolute inset-0 object-cover` with explicit z (e.g. -z-10 vs content z-10); nav glass or transparent `max-w-7xl mx-auto justify-between`; hero placement: center stack | bottom anchor (`flex-1 flex flex-col justify-end pb-12 lg:pb-16`) | bottom-left editorial.
l4Blueprint.L4.2: §4.2 Email shell: outer dark `min-h-screen` + padding; inner `max-w-[640px] mx-auto ring-1 ring-white/5 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden`; dividers `h-px` centered; hero media `aspectRatio ~640/820` + gradient scrim % stops for legibility.
l4Blueprint.L4.3: §4.3 Multi-section landing: alternate full-bleed video vs solid sections; container `max-w-[1831px]` cinematic OR `max-w-7xl`; grids `lg:grid-cols-3|2|1` gap-6–8; closing high-contrast CTA band.
l4Blueprint.L4.4: §4.4 SaaS blocks: split hero (copy + mock), bento `rounded-[20px]–[32px]` + inner `aspect-*` or `pb-[100%]` ratio; calculator `lg:grid-cols-2` no gap `rounded-2xl overflow-hidden` with `divide-y` form column.
l4Blueprint.L4.5: §4.5 Editorial portfolio: large display + tight tracking; contrast words via `em.not-italic` pattern.
l4Blueprint.L4.6: §4.6 Card wall: `min-h-screen` + full-page `<BG_IMAGE>` cover + CSS grid fixed tiles (~384px, 16px gap); per-card loop video + scrim + 8–11px type + grotesk+script+mono font bundle aliases.
l4Blueprint.L4.7: §4.7 Slide deck: black stage; all slides mounted; `opacity`+`z-index`+`pointerEvents`; keyboard + dots; optional activationCount+key to replay enter while videos stay warm.
l4Blueprint.L4.8: §4.8 Scroll-scrub video: GSAP ScrollTrigger `scrub` → `video.currentTime`; seek coalescing while `video.seeking`; optional mouse parallax; buffer overlay until `canplay`.
l4Blueprint.L4.11: §4.11 Styleguide page: swatches, type ramp, button matrix, pseudo-3D press; panels at 900/600 style breakpoints → map to Tailwind md/lg or custom @media.
l4Blueprint.L4_DEFAULT: Pick closest L4 from MotionSites-Prompt-Guide-Skill-Base §4; state hero placement, container max-width token, and forbidden overlays explicitly.

styleBlends.label: Aurora + Glassmorphism
styleBlends.hint: Dreamy translucent future UI — iridescent base + frosted panels; keep WCAG on body text.

styleBlends.label: Gothic + Vaporwave
styleBlends.hint: Dark surreal neon nostalgia — blackletter/display tension + pastel glitch collage discipline.

styleBlends.label: Japandi + Wabi Sabi
styleBlends.hint: Quiet natural minimal texture — low-chrome neutrals, asymmetry, slow transitions, tactile grain optional.

styleBlends.label: Neo-Brutalism + Y2K
styleBlends.hint: Bold glossy youth-forward — thick borders + chrome/holo accents; constrain motion budget (≤2–3 heavy effects per §3.2 perf note).

styleBlends.label: Art Deco + Luxury Typography
styleBlends.hint: Formal glamorous classic — symmetric geometry + extreme type-led whitespace; gold/jewel accents as tokens not ad-hoc gradients.

stackProfiles.label: Default: Vite + React 18 + TS + Tailwind 3 + lucide-react
Add-on: Next.js 14 App Router (instead of Vite shell)
optionalLines: OPTIONAL framework: Next.js 14 App Router for routing/layout where spec requires SSR or nested routes; keep Tailwind content globs for `app/` + `components/`.

stackProfiles.label: Add-on: long-form hero video · hls.js (.m3u8)
optionalLines: OPTIONAL media: `hls.js` + `<video>` with Safari native HLS fallback; `enableWorker: false` if sandboxed; attach MediaSource per MotionSites §3.1.

stackProfiles.label: Add-on: GSAP timeline / ScrollTrigger (scrub, pin)
optionalLines: OPTIONAL timeline: `gsap` + `ScrollTrigger` (+ ScrollToPlugin if scroll-to anchors); version floor in package.json; respect reduced-motion.

stackProfiles.label: Add-on: Spline 3D scene
optionalLines: OPTIONAL 3D: `@splinetool/react-spline` lazy scene; `pointer-events-none` on canvas chrome, `pointer-events-auto` on CTAs; mobile static fallback (perf tier S).

styles.name: Neoclassical
styles.artDirection: Formal timeless authority; symmetry; marble/architectural refs
styles.colorSystemHint: Alabaster, slate, olive gray, antique gold
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Greco-Roman columns & symmetry—reads institutional, museum, timeless luxury.

styles.name: Baroque
styles.colorSystemHint: Crimson, navy, plum, black, metallic gold
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Ornate 17th-c. drama: deep velvets, gold, layered frames—gala, opera, high hospitality.

styles.name: Aurora
styles.libraryLayout: Cinematic centered stack + translucent chrome; generous vertical air (style library).
styles.userBlurb: Iridescent gradients on dark space + glass—spiritual tech, Web3, soft futurism.

styles.name: Ethereal
styles.colorSystemHint: Pearl, dusty rose, pale sage, dove gray
styles.libraryLayout: Cinematic centered stack + translucent chrome; generous vertical air (style library).
styles.userBlurb: Feather-light hierarchy & misty imagery—wellness, skincare, calm rituals.

styles.name: Filigree
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Jewelry-fine lines & invitation frames—weddings, wine labels, heirloom brands.

styles.name: Acanthus
styles.artDirection: Botanical ornament columns; editorial side notes
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Classical carved-leaf ornament in layout—botanical luxury, heritage institutions.

styles.name: Anthropomorphic
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Mascot-led, rounded friendly UI—kids, edtech, playful consumer apps.

styles.name: Pixel Art
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: 8-bit grids & HUD chrome—indie games, retro dev culture, arcade drops.

styles.name: Conceptual Sketch
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Hand-drawn collage & blueprint overlays—studios, pitches, design-in-progress.

styles.name: Luxury Typography
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Type is the hero with vast whitespace—couture, prestige beauty, editorial.

styles.name: Japandi
styles.artDirection: Calm function; soft corners; natural materials
styles.colorSystemHint: Oat, warm gray, sage, wood beige
styles.libraryLayout: Modular product grids + split hero with secondary panel (style library + L4.4).
styles.userBlurb: Japanese calm × Scandinavian function—neutral wood, soft corners, home & wellness.

styles.name: Memphis
styles.artDirection: Broken grid; thick borders; loud pattern
styles.colorSystemHint: Hot pink, cyan, yellow, black-white patterns
styles.libraryLayout: Fixed grid card wall on full-page background; small-type mixed font roles (style library).
styles.userBlurb: 1980s Memphis Group: loud geometry & squiggles—festivals, youth campaigns.

styles.name: Bohemian
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Layered textures & earthy palette—artisan, travel, handmade lifestyle.

styles.name: Shabby Chic
styles.libraryLayout: Newsletter/email-width inner shell, stacked rhythm, centered dividers, fixed-aspect hero media (style library).
styles.userBlurb: Distressed pastel romance—weddings, bakeries, vintage feminine retail.

styles.name: Farmhouse / Cottagecore
styles.colorSystemHint: Cream, forest green, denim blue, brown
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Rustic cozy storytelling—recipes, slow living, pastoral brands.

styles.name: Victorian
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
styles.userBlurb: Damask, burgundy, framed density—historical fiction, tea, gothic romance lite.

styles.name: Art Deco
styles.libraryLayout: Cinematic centered stack + translucent chrome; generous vertical air (style library).
styles.userBlurb: 1920s sunbursts & symmetry—cocktail bars, boutique hotels, Gatsby glam.

styles.name: Art Nouveau
styles.colorSystemHint: Olive, mustard, burnt orange, soft teal
styles.libraryLayout: Clear hierarchy, varied rhythm, purposeful sections (style-library global rules).
